prompt:
Scene:
A rain-streaked window ledge at night, soft city bokeh outside, cool blue streetlight and one warm indoor lamp reflection. The surface is dark wet stone with small water droplets.

Subject:
The same transparent glass rose from the reference image, same five layered petals, curved stem, and two small leaves, now resting on the wet window ledge. Preserve its object identity, scale, petal geometry, and glass material.

Important details:
Photorealistic macro still life, accurate rain droplets on and around the glass rose, realistic refraction through petals, cool blue and warm amber highlights, shallow depth of field, visible caustics on the wet ledge, no added bouquet.

Use case:
Second image in a continuity series, showing the same material-swapped object in a new environment. Square crop-safe gallery card.

Constraints:
PRESERVE the glass rose identity from the reference. No text, no watermark, no logo, no human hands, no extra flowers, no colored petals, no cartoon style, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Rain Window
description: Rain Window keeps the same transparent glass rose in a material consistency series.

depends_on.ref_role: preserve exact glass rose petal geometry, stem curve, and material identity

generation.runner_notes: Queue must inject dependency output URLs into ref_urls before execution; image2gen --ref accepts URLs, not local paths.

en.title: Rain Window
en.description: Rain Window keeps the same transparent glass rose in a material consistency series.
